task_completion.description: Locate and open the target calendar event
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view is open and the event titled 'Investor Update Preparation' has been clicked or opened, displaying its details or edit form.

task_completion.description: Change the Privacy setting to 'Only Internal Users'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the event edit form, the 'Privacy' dropdown or selection field is set to 'Only Internal Users'.

task_completion.description: Change the Show As setting to 'Free'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the event edit form, the 'Show As' (or availability) dropdown or selection field is set to 'Free'.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button, or the event form is shown in a read-only/saved state with the updated Privacy ('Only Internal Users') and Show As ('Free') values visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface interacting with the Odoo application.

integrity.description: The agent modified the pre-existing target event rather than creating a new dummy event.
integrity.visual_evidence: The event being edited is the existing 'Investor Update Preparation' event (may show existing attendees like Alice Johnson, Henry Kim, Grace Patel, or location 'Board Room').

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console, etc.) are open or being used to manipulate the page DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Event: 'Investor Update Preparation'. Target Privacy: 'Only Internal Users' (Odoo backend value: 'confidential'). Target Show As: 'Free' (Odoo backend value: 'free'). Initial states before modification were Privacy='Everyone' (public) and Show As='Busy' (busy). The event includes attendees Alice Johnson, Henry Kim, and Grace Patel, and is scheduled in the Board Room.
